name: QA 1720
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1720

Exercises pmdastatsd - agent's memory handling with Valgrind



Copyright (c) 2020 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform fedora_rawhide reproduce
